@ cancel:
@@ sub-cancel:
(((11 + 13) + 2) - 2)
(((11 + 13) - 2) + 2)
((11 + 13) + (2 - 2))
((11 + 13) - (2 - 2))
((11 + (13 + 2)) - 2)
(11 + ((13 + 2) - 2))
((11 + (13 - 2)) + 2)
(11 + ((13 - 2) + 2))
(11 + (13 + (2 - 2)))
(11 + (13 - (2 - 2)))
(((11 + 2) + 13) - 2)
((11 + 2) + (13 - 2))
(((11 + 2) - 2) + 13)
((11 + 2) - (2 - 13))
(((11 - 2) + 13) + 2)
((11 - 2) + (13 + 2))
(((11 - 2) + 2) + 13)
((11 - 2) + (2 + 13))
((11 + (2 + 13)) - 2)
(11 + ((2 + 13) - 2))
((11 - (2 - 13)) + 2)
(11 - ((2 - 13) - 2))
(11 - (2 - (13 + 2)))
(11 + (2 + (13 - 2)))
((11 + (2 - 2)) + 13)
((11 - (2 - 2)) + 13)
(11 + ((2 - 2) + 13))
(11 - ((2 - 2) - 13))
(11 - (2 - (2 + 13)))
(11 + (2 - (2 - 13)))
(((13 + 11) + 2) - 2)
(((13 + 11) - 2) + 2)
((13 + 11) + (2 - 2))
((13 + 11) - (2 - 2))
((13 + (11 + 2)) - 2)
(13 + ((11 + 2) - 2))
((13 + (11 - 2)) + 2)
(13 + ((11 - 2) + 2))
(13 + (11 + (2 - 2)))
(13 + (11 - (2 - 2)))

((13 + 2) + (11 - 2))
(((13 + 2) - 2) + 11)
((13 + 2) - (2 - 11))
(((13 - 2) + 11) + 2)
((13 - 2) + (11 + 2))
(((13 - 2) + 2) + 11)
((13 - 2) + (2 + 11))
((13 + (2 + 11)) - 2)
(13 + ((2 + 11) - 2))
((13 - (2 - 11)) + 2)
(13 - ((2 - 11) - 2))
(13 - (2 - (11 + 2)))
(13 + (2 + (11 - 2)))
((13 + (2 - 2)) + 11)
((13 - (2 - 2)) + 11)
(13 + ((2 - 2) + 11))
(13 - ((2 - 2) - 11))
(13 - (2 - (2 + 11)))
(13 + (2 - (2 - 11)))
(((2 + 11) + 13) - 2)
((2 + 11) + (13 - 2))
(((2 + 11) - 2) + 13)
((2 + 11) - (2 - 13))

(2 + (11 - (2 - 13)))

@@ div-cancel-double:
(((11 + 13) * 2) / 2)
(((11 + 13) / 2) * 2)
((11 + 13) * (2 / 2))
((11 + 13) / (2 / 2))
(((13 + 11) * 2) / 2)
(((13 + 11) / 2) * 2)
((13 + 11) * (2 / 2))
((13 + 11) / (2 / 2))
((2 * (11 + 13)) / 2)
(2 * ((11 + 13) / 2))
((2 * (13 + 11)) / 2)
(2 * ((13 + 11) / 2))
((2 / 2) * (11 + 13))
((2 / 2) * (13 + 11))
(2 / (2 / (11 + 13)))
(2 / (2 / (13 + 11)))

@@ div-cancel-13:
(11 + ((13 * 2) / 2))
(11 + ((13 / 2) * 2))
(11 + (13 * (2 / 2)))
(11 + (13 / (2 / 2)))
(11 + ((2 * 13) / 2))
(11 + (2 * (13 / 2)))
(11 + ((2 / 2) * 13))
(11 + (2 / (2 / 13)))
(((13 * 2) / 2) + 11)
(((13 / 2) * 2) + 11)
((13 * (2 / 2)) + 11)
((13 / (2 / 2)) + 11)
(((2 * 13) / 2) + 11)
((2 * (13 / 2)) + 11)
(((2 / 2) * 13) + 11)
((2 / (2 / 13)) + 11)

@@ div-cancel-11:
(((11 * 2) / 2) + 13)
(((11 / 2) * 2) + 13)
((11 * (2 / 2)) + 13)
((11 / (2 / 2)) + 13)
(13 + ((11 * 2) / 2))
(13 + ((11 / 2) * 2))
(13 + (11 * (2 / 2)))
(13 + (11 / (2 / 2)))
(13 + ((2 * 11) / 2))
(13 + (2 * (11 / 2)))
(13 + ((2 / 2) * 11))
(13 + (2 / (2 / 11)))
(((2 * 11) / 2) + 13)
((2 * (11 / 2)) + 13)
(((2 / 2) * 11) + 13)
((2 / (2 / 11)) + 13)
